name: Chabial Reunion
overview: Seven dramas in seven days with 7 different stories under the banner of Chabial Reunion. The series of drama will be directed by country's leading directors Mostafa Kamal Raz, Adnan Al Rajeev, Ashfaque Nipun, Humayun Sadhu, Saraf Ahmed Zibon, Redoan Rony, Iftekhar Ahmed Fahmi, Ashutosh Sujon, under the supervision and direction of country's one of the famous and popular director Mostofa Sarwar Farooki.
